title: Document Identity
summary: Feature parent for immutable timestamp-code document identities, added-date normalization, creation boundaries, and repository-owned source migration.
content_html:
Document Identity

Replace title-like document identifiers with immutable codes that remain accurate because they carry identity and issuance time, not document meaning.

Feature Documents

  • Concept — lasting purpose, identity contract, date model, and user-visible consequences.
  • Architecture — proposed generation, creation/import ownership, migration planning, and known pressure points.
  • Delivery — the complete repository-owned migration and new-document cutover.
  • Docs Viewer Roadmap — priority and sequence.

Status

DI-01 is ready and next on the Docs Viewer Roadmap. Implementation has not started.

These documents deliberately use the proposed timestamp-code IDs and matching filenames. They are the first small proof that Docs Viewer navigation no longer depends on semantic source filenames.

Closeout

After DI-01 ships, retain the concept as the durable Document Identity overview, remove resolved proposal language, title it Document Identity, and reparent it under the durable Docs Viewer documentation. Retire this router, the proposed architecture, and the delivery document when they no longer own unresolved work.
